mapper.select: SELECT id, entity_code, attribute_code, attribute_name, physical_column, data_type, description, is_deleted, creator, created_dt, last_editor, last_edited_dt FROM agent.dsl_attribute WHERE entity_code = #{entityCode} AND is_deleted = false

SELECT id, entity_code, attribute_code, attribute_name, physical_column, data_type, description, is_deleted, creator, created_dt, last_editor, last_edited_dt FROM agent.dsl_attribute WHERE is_deleted = false AND entity_code IN #{code}

SELECT a.id, a.attribute_name, a.description, e.entity_name AS entity_name FROM agent.dsl_attribute a LEFT JOIN agent.dsl_entity e ON a.entity_code = e.entity_code AND e.is_deleted = false WHERE a.is_deleted = false AND a.embedding IS NULL
